docs.title: Senior Technical Writer
docs.text:
I am a Technical Writer with strong expertise in creating user-focused documentation for ERP applications, AI platforms, LMS, Banking, Healthcare, Cybersecurity, and Bot Builder. My experience spans across technical writing, docs-as-code workflows, automation scripting, and collaborating within Agile software development environments.

Over the years, I have worked on a wide range of documentation including:

  • User guides
  • API documentation
  • Installation guides
  • Release notes
  • “What’s New”
  • Knowledge base articles
  • Help center content

I specialize in transforming complex technical workflows into clear, structured, and accessible documentation that improves user experience and product adoption.

docs.title: Technical Expertise
docs.text:
I have hands-on experience working with:

  • MkDocs
  • Sphinx
  • Docs-as-Code workflows
  • Python
  • HTML & CSS
  • WordPress
  • Ixiasoft CMS
  • Oxygen XML Editor
  • Camtasia
  • SnagIt
  • Doc-to-Help
  • MS Word
  • ReadMe
  • Postman and Swagger

I have successfully set up and customized docs-as-code environments using both MkDocs and Sphinx, including documentation deployment workflows and UI customization using CSS.

docs.title: Automation & AI Experience
docs.text:
In addition to technical writing, I leverage Python and generative AI tools to improve documentation efficiency and scalability.

Some notable contributions include:

  • Automated the translation of chatbot and knowledge base articles into 77 languages using Python libraries
  • Reduced a week-long manual translation workflow to a process completed within a single day through automation
  • Leveraged generative AI tools to refine and optimize technical documentation while ensuring consistency and adherence to documentation standards
  • Automated table of contents (TOC) generation across Zendesk help center pages to improve navigation and user experience

I have collaborated closely with:

  • AI Product Managers
  • Developers
  • Quality Analysts
  • Cross-functional Agile teams

throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), participating in sprint ceremonies, gathering requirements, and documenting complex application workflows.

My ability to quickly understand applications across different domains — including ERPs, banking applications, chatbots, and AI systems — enables me to create accurate, high-quality documentation tailored to end users and technical audiences alike.

docs.title: What Drives Me
docs.text: I enjoy bridging the gap between technology and users by creating documentation that is clear, scalable, and impactful. Combining technical writing with automation, AI-assisted workflows, and modern documentation practices allows me to continuously improve documentation quality and delivery efficiency.
